BASE.name: ATTACK_VECTOR
BASE.justification: Unencoded values inserted into <script> can be supplied via URL parameters.

BASE.name: ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
BASE.justification: Direct script-context injection is typically straightforward.

BASE.name: PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
BASE.justification: No privileges needed if page is reachable.

BASE.name: SCOPE
BASE.justification: Client-side impact within the app context.

BASE.name: CONFIDENTIALITY
BASE.justification: Script injection can steal session tokens or sensitive in-page data.

BASE.name: INTEGRITY
BASE.justification: Injected scripts can perform actions on behalf of the user and alter application behavior.

TEMPORAL.name: EXPLOIT_CODE_MATURITY
TEMPORAL.justification: Widely available XSS payloads for script contexts.

TEMPORAL.name: REMEDIATION_LEVEL
TEMPORAL.justification: JSONENCODE/JSENCODE are standard and recommended fixes.

TEMPORAL.name: REPORT_CONFIDENCE
TEMPORAL.justification: Rule targets unencoded script contexts reliably.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_VECTOR
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The affected Visualforce or web page is accessed over HTTP(S), allowing remote attackers to exploit the issue without local access.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_ATTACK_COMPLEXITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: No additional environmental conditions or protections significantly increase the difficulty of exploitation.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_PRIVILEGES_REQUIRED
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Attackers do not require authentication or elevated privileges to supply malicious input if the page is publicly or broadly accessible.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_USER_INTERACTION
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: A user must view or interact with the affected page for the injected script to execute in the browser.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_SCOPE
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The impact remains within the same application and browser execution context without crossing into another security authority.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_CONFIDENTIALITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Injected scripts can access cookies, session identifiers, and sensitive page data specific to the user.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_INTEGRITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Malicious scripts can manipulate DOM content, perform unauthorized actions, or submit forged requests on behalf of the user.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: MODIFIED_AVAILABILITY
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: The vulnerability does not directly impact application uptime or service availability.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: CONFIDENTIALITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Protecting user sessions, authentication tokens, and sensitive business data is critical in this environment.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: INTEGRITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Preventing unauthorized actions and manipulation of application behavior is essential for maintaining trust and correctness.

ENVIRONMENTAL.name: AVAILABILITY_REQUIREMENT
ENVIRONMENTAL.justification: Availability is not the primary concern for this vulnerability compared to confidentiality and integrity impacts.
